mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects ( title, summary, description, thumbnail_url, feature_image_urls, feature_image_captions, project_url, start_date, end_date, use_yn, tech_stack, my_role, trouble_shooting, github_url, deploy_url, result, display_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{summary}, #{description}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{featureImageUrls}, #{featureImageCaptions}, #{projectUrl}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{useYn}, #{techStack}, #{myRole}, #{troubleShooting}, #{githubUrl}, #{deployUrl}, #{result}, #{displayOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.summary, p.description, p.thumbnail_url, p.feature_image_urls, p.feature_image_captions, p.project_url, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.use_yn, p.tech_stack, p.my_role, p.trouble_shooting, p.github_url, p.deploy_url, p.result, pa.filename AS attachment_filename, pa.content_type AS attachment_content_type, pa.file_size AS attachment_file_size, (pa.id IS NOT NULL) AS has_attachment, (pa.id IS NOT NULL) AS has_portfolio, p.display_order, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM projects p LEFT JOIN project_attachments pa ON pa.project_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.summary, p.description, p.thumbnail_url, p.feature_image_urls, p.feature_image_captions, p.project_url, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.use_yn, p.tech_stack, p.my_role, p.trouble_shooting, p.github_url, p.deploy_url, p.result, pa.filename AS attachment_filename, pa.content_type AS attachment_content_type, pa.file_size AS attachment_file_size, (pa.id IS NOT NULL) AS has_attachment, (pa.id IS NOT NULL) AS has_portfolio, p.display_order, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM projects p LEFT JOIN project_attachments pa ON pa.project_id = p.id ORDER BY p.display_order ASC, p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, pa.filename AS attachment_filename, pa.content_type AS attachment_content_type, pa.file_size AS attachment_file_size, pa.data AS attachment_data FROM projects p JOIN project_attachments pa ON pa.project_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.summary, p.thumbnail_url, p.project_url, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.use_yn, p.github_url, p.deploy_url, (pa.id IS NOT NULL) AS has_attachment, (pa.id IS NOT NULL) AS has_portfolio, p.display_order, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM projects p LEFT JOIN project_attachments pa ON pa.project_id = p.id ORDER BY p.display_order ASC, p.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, description = #{description}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, feature_image_urls = #{featureImageUrls}, feature_image_captions = #{featureImageCaptions}, project_url = #{projectUrl}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, use_yn = #{useYn}, tech_stack = #{techStack}, my_role = #{myRole}, trouble_shooting = #{troubleShooting}, github_url = #{githubUrl}, deploy_url = #{deployUrl}, result = #{result}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE projects SET thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, feature_image_urls = #{featureImageUrls}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE projects SET display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

INSERT INTO project_attachments ( project_id, filename, content_type, file_size, data, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{attachmentFilename}, #{attachmentContentType}, #{attachmentFileSize}, #{attachmentData}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (project_id) DO UPDATE SET filename = EXCLUDED.filename, content_type = EXCLUDED.content_type, file_size = EXCLUDED.file_size, data = EXCLUDED.data, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
